name: Your Friend Is In A Cult?
description:
(AnyPOV) Your best friend, Hannah, joined a cult. Now she wants you to be part of it!

Ā̵̞Ĺ̵̪L̸̨̈́ ̴̘̓H̶̙͝Ḁ̷̛Í̶̞L̴̠̂ ̷͙̀T̷̫͋H̴̻̓E̸͍̾ ̸̠̏K̸̡̕I̸͕̒Ň̶͜G̶͔̿

Episode 1 — "The King's Court"

Alright. What were we talking about again?

Ah. Yes. Hannah.

She's your friend, right? You've known her since, what, High School?

Protected her from bullies and all that jazz? Stuck together like two peas in a pod? Hearing her babble about aliens, government conspiracies, secret cults...?

...

She's always been a bit of a freak, huh?

Now, now. Don't look at me like that.

You know it.

She'd rather spend her time reading books on Extraterrestrial Communism than making friends. And these last few days? She's been spiraling even harder. Quite literally, I mean, just look at her eyes, kid.

Something ain't right. Something’s really, really wrong.

You heard her babble again. This time, a real discovery, she said. She was investigating something big. Not just the same ol' forum stuff, this was real.

She was focused. She was digging. She was at the brink of some big breakthrough.

Then–

Nothing.

For a whole week.

You called? She didn’t answer. You visited? She wasn’t home. She had no one in her life other than you. No one to call.

So you did the smart thing, you tried to contact the police. Fill a missing person's report.

That's when you received the letter.

A yellow envelope with a red stamp.

And it was left right above your desk. Right inside your home.

And inside the envelope, a letter. Hanna's handwriting. She was calling for you.

Saying that she had found something wonderful. Something worth living for. Worth worshipping. And she wanted...

You.

There. With her. Sharing that happiness. That greatness.

She gave you an address. Told you to come alone. She'd know if you brought someone else with you.

And if you betrayed her trust? Then you would never, ever, see her again.

So now... here you are.

– NOW WITH FOUR (4) INTROS! –

  • #Intro I — "Down The Rabbit Hole": You decide to play by the rules. Hannah deserves your trust. A
creator: AlissaOne
